# `modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.c`

UWB facade: binds the CCC credential-based STS engine to the DW3000 radio, exposes Aliro DS-TWR responder start/stop and range query, and manages platform dependencies (HFCLK boost, SPI init, callbacks).

**depends on** [`modules/woz_uwb/src/ccc/aliro_kdf.h`](../modules.woz_uwb.src.ccc/aliro_kdf.h.md), [`modules/woz_uwb/src/ccc/ccc_shim.h`](../modules.woz_uwb.src.ccc/ccc_shim.h.md), [`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.h`](woz_uwb_facade.h.md), [`modules/woz_uwb/src/fira/fira_session.h`](../modules.woz_uwb.src.fira/fira_session.h.md)

## API

### `static void woz_hfclk_ensure_128mhz(void)`
`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.c:24`

@brief One-shot boost of the app-core HFCLK to 128 MHz for the DW3000 SPI bus.
nRF5340-specific platform seam: the app core boots with HFCLK divided to
64 MHz. Other SoCs (e.g. ESP32-S3) clock their SPI controller independently,
so this compiles to a no-op there. See docs/porting.md.

**called by** `woz_uwb_bind_ursk`, `woz_uwb_start_aliro`

### `int woz_uwb_bind_ursk(const uint8_t *ursk, size_t ursk_len)`
`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.c:36`

Bind the CCC STS from the add-on-supplied plaintext URSK; returns 0 on success.

**calls** `woz_hfclk_ensure_128mhz`

### `int woz_uwb_start_aliro(const struct woz_uwb_aliro_cfg *c)`
`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.c:44`

Ranging parameters the Aliro M1-M4 handshake negotiated.

### `int woz_uwb_start_aliro(const struct woz_uwb_aliro_cfg *c)`
`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.c:44`

Start the CCC DS-TWR responder bound to a live Aliro credential; returns 0 on success.

**calls** `woz_hfclk_ensure_128mhz`

### `void woz_uwb_stop(void)`
`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.c:71`

Quiesce the radio and unbind the CCC STS shim.

### `bool woz_uwb_last_range_cm(int32_t *cm_out)`
`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.c:77`

Latest distance in cm; true if a valid range has been seen.
